doc: Good Button fan-out: one 0..1 `knob`, smoothed against zipper noise and fanned through two ranged maps into CV Signals -- the composition behind every Good Button artifact (a brightness knob onto filter cutoff + resonance, a tone knob onto a DJ-filter position). The recipe ends at the CVs; the parent wires the targets on. `cv` is the primary map (Exponential -- perceptually even for Hz-like targets; range rides `out_min`/`out_max`, resting at a cutoff-shaped 600..11000). `cv2` is the secondary map (Linear; range rides `out2_min`/`out2_max`, resting at a resonance-shaped 0.1..0.7) -- leave it unconsumed for a one-target knob.

nodes.doc: The `knob` pipe's held value [0,1] smoothed into a CV Signal, fanned to the two ranged maps below.
knob [0,1] -> [out_min, out_max], exponential (perceptually even) -> the `cv` output.
